title: Searching Your Photos
drDigitalIntro:
Photo apps can recognize what's in your pictures.
• Search "beach" to see all your beach photos.
• Search "dog", or type someone's name.
• It saves huge time, and the search happens right on your device.

steps.say: Click the Search bar at the top.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched your photos! The photo app recognizes what's in your images so you can find them fast.
drDigitalHint: Click the Search bar and type a word like 'beach' to find matching photos.
